scripts.test: npm run test:api && npm run test:ui
scripts.test:api:report: npm run test:api && allure generate allure-results -o allure-report --clean && allure open allure-report
scripts.test:ui:report: npm run test:ui && allure generate allure-results -o allure-report --clean && allure open allure-report
scripts.test:report: npm run test && allure generate allure-results -o allure-report --clean && allure open allure-report
